subcodes.first_line: Praise and glorification befit the Lord of the Kingdom of Names, Who through His will [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنا مالک ملکوت اسما را سزا که باراده
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for governments and rulers, @chastisement and requital, @power of the Manifestation of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
